title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care, services include care for acute and chronic illnesses, annual exams for children and adults, health screenings, and health education related to patients needs and issues. Offers insurance enrollment assistance. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-9596 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or for an appointment. Virtual and walk in appointments offered. FEES: Accepts OHP, most private insurance, and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off NE Stephens Street, across the street from Costco Services: Blood Pressure Screening Community Clinics Diabetes Screening General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Navigator Programs Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PHARMACY HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATION CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG
